com.rscja.deviceapi.linux.usb

Class HF_15693_UsbForLinux

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.rscja.deviceapi.linux.usb.HF_15693_UsbForLinux
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    IRFIDWithHFBase, IRFIDWithISO15693

extends java.lang.Object
implements IRFIDWithISO15693
